title: EPFL AI Policy Tracker Report - May 2026
summary: EPFL has published official guidance on generative AI use for students and teachers. Staged claims cover AI disclosure for assessment material, privacy warnings for confidential or personal information, course-level communication of AI-use rules, AI plagiarism and AI-detection limits, and the current limitation on Microsoft 365 Copilot for regulated data processing. Claims are agent-reviewed staged candidates only and are not canonical tracker conclusions.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official EPFL statement unless a linked source is EPFL's own official page.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
